stemHtml:
Select the correct/incorrect statements:

I. A Polar Orbiting satellite is able to take a higher resolution image, compared with a Geostationary satellite.
II. A Geostationary satellite orbits at a higher altitude than a Polar Orbiting Satellite.

options.a: I and II are both incorrect.
options.b: I and II are both correct.
options.c: I is correct, II is incorrect.
options.d: I is incorrect, II is correct.
